channel.title: Earnings Call Strategic Briefings
channel.description: Weekly strategic briefings distilled from earnings call transcripts. Covers long-term strategy, culture, org structure, and competitive positioning — no quarterly noise.
channel.itunes:author: Arjun's Earnings Agent
channel.itunes:summary: Weekly strategic briefings distilled from earnings call transcripts. Covers long-term strategy, culture, org structure, and competitive positioning — no quarterly noise.

item.title: How FTAI Aviation Profits from Old Engines
item.description: Strategic briefing on FTAI Aviation — the contrarian bet on aging CFM56 engines and how maintenance monopolies create durable cash flows.

item.title: Broadcom: AI Networking and the VMware Pivot
item.description: Strategic briefing on Broadcom — their AI networking dominance and the bold VMware acquisition reshaping enterprise infrastructure.

item.title: Why Nvidia is Breaking the Power Grid
item.description: Strategic briefing on Nvidia — the GPU monopoly powering the AI revolution and the energy infrastructure challenges it creates.

item.title: Arista Networks: The Nervous System of AI
item.description: Strategic briefing on Arista Networks — how they became the backbone of hyperscale data centers and why AI networking is their next growth vector.

item.title: How Shopify Built the Internet's Invisible Mall
item.description: Strategic briefing on Shopify — the infrastructure layer powering millions of online stores, and how they're expanding beyond commerce.

item.title: Trisura: Dual Engine for Specialty Insurance Growth
item.description: Strategic briefing on Trisura Group — how they built a dual-engine model combining fronting and specialty insurance to compound in niche markets.

item.title: How Wise is Replacing the SWIFT Network
item.description: Strategic briefing on Wise (formerly TransferWise) — building parallel financial infrastructure to displace SWIFT and legacy banking rails.

item.title: Inside Adyen's Trillion-Euro Payment Engine
item.description: Strategic briefing on Adyen — the single-platform payments processor handling trillions in volume for the world's largest enterprises.

item.title: Arjun's Philosophy — Investment Framework (Full Narration)
item.description: A comprehensive 2+ hour narration of Arjun's investment philosophy across 30 companies and three frameworks: Serial Acquirers, Niche Lenders and Underwriters, and Idiosyncratic Thinkers.
